channel.title: Events on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: FOSDEM 2014 is coming
item.description:
and with that almost a full week of side events.
For those who don’t know FOSDEM, (where have you been hiding for the past 13 years ? ) Fosdem is the annual Free and Open Source Developers European meeting. If you are into open source , you just can’t mis this event where thousands of likeminded people will meet.

And if 2 days of FOSDEM madness isn’t enough people organise events around it.

item.title: Codebreakers
item.description:
@fredegre sent me a mail to tell me about the L-SEC Codebreakers and Enigmas’s - Special Event , given the lineup I couldn’t resist to register for the event ..

Security heroes like Bruce Schneier , Adi Shamir , Ron Rivest and off course our local experts…

Should be interresting

Cya there ..
